title: tolpis barbata var. dichroa
intro: Tolpis barbata var. dichroa, also known as the dual-coloured top knot or Tolpis dichroa, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tolpis barbata var. dichroa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions and wounds.
